ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلْجِدَارُ فَكَانَ لِغُلَـٰمَيْنِ يَتِيمَيْنِ فِى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ وَكَانَ تَحْتَهُۥ كَنزٌ لَّهُمَا وَكَانَ أَبُوهُمَا صَـٰلِحًا فَأَرَادَ رَبُّكَ أَن يَبْلُغَآ أَشُدَّهُمَا وَيَسْتَخْرِجَا كَنزَهُمَا رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ وَمَا فَعَلْتُهُۥ عَنْ أَمْرِى ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَأْوِيلُ مَا لَمْ تَسْطِع عَّلَيْهِ صَبْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma aljidaru fakana lighulamayni yateemayni fee almadeenati wakana tahtahu kanzun lahuma wakana aboohuma salihan faarada rabbuka an yablugha ashuddahuma wayastakhrija kanzahuma rahmatan min rabbika wama faAAaltuhu AAan amree thalika taweelu ma lam tastiAA AAalayhi sabran

translations.en_sahih: And as for the wall, it belonged to two orphan boys in the city, and there was beneath it a treasure for them, and their father had been righteous. So your Lord intended that they reach maturity and extract their treasure, as a mercy from your Lord. And I did it not of my own accord. That is the interpretation of that about which you could not have patience."
translations.en_yusufali: "As for the wall, it belonged to two youths, orphans, in the Town; there was, beneath it, a buried treasure, to which they were entitled: their father had been a righteous man: So thy Lord desired that they should attain their age of full strength and get out their treasure - a mercy (and favour) from thy Lord. I did it not of my own accord. Such is the interpretation of (those things) over which thou wast unable to hold patience."
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun tembok itu pula, adalah ia dipunyai oleh dua orang anak yatim di bandar itu; dan di bawahnya ada "harta terpendam" kepuyaan mereka; dan bapa mereka pula adalah orang yang soleh. Maka Tuhanmu menghendaki supaya mereka cukup umur dan dapat mengeluarkan harta mereka yang terpendam itu, sebagai satu rahmat dari Tuhanmu (kepada mereka). Dan (ingatlah) aku tidak melakukannya menurut fikiranku sendiri. Demikianlah penjelasan tentang maksud dan tujuan perkara-perkara yang engkau tidak dapat bersabar mengenainya".

ayahs.arabic: وَيَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَن ذِى ٱلْقَرْنَيْنِ ۖ قُلْ سَأَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْكُم مِّنْهُ ذِكْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayasaloonaka AAan thee alqarnayni qul saatloo AAalaykum minhu thikran

translations.en_sahih: And they ask you, [O Muhammad], about Dhul-Qarnayn. Say, "I will recite to you about him a report."
translations.en_yusufali: They ask thee concerning Zul-qarnain. Say, "I will rehearse to you something of his story."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka bertanya kepadamu (wahai Muhammad), mengenai Zulkarnain. Katakanlah: "Aku akan bacakan kepada kamu (wahyu dari Allah yang menerangkan) sedikit tentang perihalnya":

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا مَكَّنَّا لَهُۥ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ سَبَبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna makkanna lahu fee alardi waataynahu min kulli shayin sababan

translations.en_sahih: Indeed We established him upon the earth, and We gave him to everything a way.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily We established his power on earth, and We gave him the ways and the means to all ends.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah memberikan kepadanya kekuasaan memerintah di bumi, dan Kami beri kepadanya jalan bagi menjayakan tiap-tiap sesuatu yang diperlukannya.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَتْبَعَ سَبَبًا
ayahs.transliteration: FaatbaAAa sababan

translations.en_sahih: So he followed a way
translations.en_yusufali: One (such) way he followed,
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu ia menurut jalan (yang menyampaikan maksudnya).

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ مَغْرِبَ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَجَدَهَا تَغْرُبُ فِى عَيْنٍ حَمِئَةٍ وَوَجَدَ عِندَهَا قَوْمًا ۗ قُلْنَا يَـٰذَا ٱلْقَرْنَيْنِ إِمَّآ أَن تُعَذِّبَ وَإِمَّآ أَن تَتَّخِذَ فِيهِمْ حُسْنًا
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha balagha maghriba alshshamsi wajadaha taghrubu fee AAaynin hamiatin wawajada AAindaha qawman qulna ya tha alqarnayni imma an tuAAaththiba waimma an tattakhitha feehim husnan

translations.en_sahih: Until, when he reached the setting of the sun, he found it [as if] setting in a spring of dark mud, and he found near it a people. Allah said, "O Dhul-Qarnayn, either you punish [them] or else adopt among them [a way of] goodness."
translations.en_yusufali: Until, when he reached the setting of the sun, he found it set in a spring of murky water: Near it he found a People: We said: "O Zul-qarnain! (thou hast authority,) either to punish them, or to treat them with kindness."
translations.ms_basmeih: Sehingga apabila ia sampai ke daerah matahari terbenam, ia mendapatinya terbenam di sebuah matair yang hitam berlumpur, dan ia dapati di sisinya satu kaum (yang kufur ingkar). Kami berfirman (dengan mengilhamkan kepadanya): "Wahai Zulkarnain! Pilihlah sama ada engkau hendak menyeksa mereka atau engkau bertindak secara baik terhadap mereka".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَمَّا مَن ظَلَمَ فَسَوْفَ نُعَذِّبُهُۥ ثُمَّ يُرَدُّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ فَيُعَذِّبُهُۥ عَذَابًا نُّكْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala amma man thalama fasawfa nuAAaththibuhu thumma yuraddu ila rabbihi fayuAAaththibuhu AAathaban nukran

translations.en_sahih: He said, "As for one who wrongs, we will punish him. Then he will be returned to his Lord, and He will punish him with a terrible punishment.
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Whoever doth wrong, him shall we punish; then shall he be sent back to his Lord; and He will punish him with a punishment unheard-of (before).
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia berkata: "Adapun orang yang melakukan kezaliman (kufur derhaka), maka kami akan menyeksanya; kemudian ia akan dikembalikan kepada Tuhannya, lalu diazabkannya dengan azab seksa yang seburuk-buruknya.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءً ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنْ أَمْرِنَا يُسْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma man amana waAAamila salihan falahu jazaan alhusna wasanaqoolu lahu min amrina yusran

translations.en_sahih: But as for one who believes and does righteousness, he will have a reward of Paradise, and we will speak to him from our command with ease."
translations.en_yusufali: "But whoever believes, and works righteousness,- he shall have a goodly reward, and easy will be his task as We order it by our Command."
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun orang yang beriman serta beramal soleh, maka baginya balasan yang sebaik-baiknya; dan kami akan perintahkan kepadanya perintah-perintah kami yang tidak memberati".

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَتْبَعَ سَبَبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma atbaAAa sababan

translations.en_sahih: Then he followed a way
translations.en_yusufali: Then followed he (another) way,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian ia berpatah balik menurut jalan yang lain.

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ مَطْلِعَ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَجَدَهَا تَطْلُعُ عَلَىٰ قَوْمٍ لَّمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُم مِّن دُونِهَا سِتْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha balagha matliAAa alshshamsi wajadaha tatluAAu AAala qawmin lam najAAal lahum min dooniha sitran

translations.en_sahih: Until, when he came to the rising of the sun, he found it rising on a people for whom We had not made against it any shield.
translations.en_yusufali: Until, when he came to the rising of the sun, he found it rising on a people for whom We had provided no covering protection against the sun.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sehingga apabila ia sampai di daerah matahari terbit, ia mendapatinya terbit kepada suatu kaum yang kami tidak menjadikan bagi mereka sebarang perlindungan daripadanya.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ وَقَدْ أَحَطْنَا بِمَا لَدَيْهِ خُبْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika waqad ahatna bima ladayhi khubran

translations.en_sahih: Thus. And We had encompassed [all] that he had in knowledge.
translations.en_yusufali: (He left them) as they were: We completely understood what was before him.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah halnya; dan sesungguhnya Kami mengetahui secara meliputi akan segala yang ada padanya.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَتْبَعَ سَبَبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma atbaAAa sababan

translations.en_sahih: Then he followed a way
translations.en_yusufali: Then followed he (another) way,
translations.ms_basmeih: kemudian ia berpatah balik menurut jalan yang lain.

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ بَيْنَ ٱلسَّدَّيْنِ وَجَدَ مِن دُونِهِمَا قَوْمًا لَّا يَكَادُونَ يَفْقَهُونَ قَوْلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha balagha bayna alssaddayni wajada min doonihima qawman la yakadoona yafqahoona qawlan

translations.en_sahih: Until, when he reached [a pass] between two mountains, he found beside them a people who could hardly understand [his] speech.
translations.en_yusufali: Until, when he reached (a tract) between two mountains, he found, beneath them, a people who scarcely understood a word.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sehingga apabila ia sampai di antara dua gunung, ia dapati di sisinya satu kaum yang hampir-hampir mereka tidak dapat memahami perkataan.

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰذَا ٱلْقَرْنَيْنِ إِنَّ يَأْجُوجَ وَمَأْجُوجَ مُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَهَلْ نَجْعَلُ لَكَ خَرْجًا عَلَىٰٓ أَن تَجْعَلَ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَهُمْ سَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo ya tha alqarnayni inna yajooja wamajooja mufsidoona fee alardi fahal najAAalu laka kharjan AAala an tajAAala baynana wabaynahum saddan

translations.en_sahih: They said, "O Dhul-Qarnayn, indeed Gog and Magog are [great] corrupters in the land. So may we assign for you an expenditure that you might make between us and them a barrier?"
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "O Zul-qarnain! the Gog and Magog (People) do great mischief on earth: shall we then render thee tribute in order that thou mightest erect a barrier between us and them?
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berkata: "wahai Zulkarnain, sesungguhnya kaum Yakjuj dan Makjuj sentiasa melakukan kerosakan di bumi; oleh itu, setujukah kiranya kami menentukan sejumlah bayaran kepadamu (dari hasil pendapatan kami) dengan syarat engkau membina sebuah tembok di antara kami dengan mereka?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ مَا مَكَّنِّى فِيهِ رَبِّى خَيْرٌ فَأَعِينُونِى بِقُوَّةٍ أَجْعَلْ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَهُمْ رَدْمًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ma makkannee feehi rabbee khayrun faaAAeenoonee biquwwatin ajAAal baynakum wabaynahum radman

translations.en_sahih: He said, "That in which my Lord has established me is better [than what you offer], but assist me with strength; I will make between you and them a dam.
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "(The power) in which my Lord has established me is better (than tribute): Help me therefore with strength (and labour): I will erect a strong barrier between you and them:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dia menjawab: "(kekuasaan dan kekayaan) yang Tuhanku jadikan daku menguasainya, lebih baik (dari bayaran kamu); oleh itu bantulah daku dengan tenaga (kamu beramai-ramai) aku akan bina antara kamu dengan mereka sebuah tembok penutup yang kukuh.

ayahs.arabic: ءَاتُونِى زُبَرَ ٱلْحَدِيدِ ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا سَاوَىٰ بَيْنَ ٱلصَّدَفَيْنِ قَالَ ٱنفُخُوا۟ ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَعَلَهُۥ نَارًا قَالَ ءَاتُونِىٓ أُفْرِغْ عَلَيْهِ قِطْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Atoonee zubara alhadeedi hatta itha sawa bayna alsadafayni qala onfukhoo hatta itha jaAAalahu naran qala atoonee ofrigh AAalayhi qitran

translations.en_sahih: Bring me sheets of iron" - until, when he had leveled [them] between the two mountain walls, he said, "Blow [with bellows]," until when he had made it [like] fire, he said, "Bring me, that I may pour over it molten copper."
translations.en_yusufali: "Bring me blocks of iron." At length, when he had filled up the space between the two steep mountain-sides, He said, "Blow (with your bellows)" Then, when he had made it (red) as fire, he said: "Bring me, that I may pour over it, molten lead."
translations.ms_basmeih: Bawalah kepadaku ketul-ketul besi"; sehingga apabila ia terkumpul separas tingginya menutup lapangan antara dua gunung itu, ddia pun perintahkan mereka membakarnya dengan berkata: "Tiuplah dengan alat-alat kamu" sehingga apabila ia menjadikannya merah menyala seperti api, berkatalah dia: "Bawalah tembaga cair supaya aku tuangkan atasnya".

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا ٱسْطَـٰعُوٓا۟ أَن يَظْهَرُوهُ وَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ لَهُۥ نَقْبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Fama istaAAoo an yathharoohu wama istataAAoo lahu naqban

translations.en_sahih: So Gog and Magog were unable to pass over it, nor were they able [to effect] in it any penetration.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus were they made powerless to scale it or to dig through it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka mereka tidak dapat memanjat tembok itu, dan mereka juga tidak dapat menebuknya.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰذَا رَحْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّى ۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ وَعْدُ رَبِّى جَعَلَهُۥ دَكَّآءَ ۖ وَكَانَ وَعْدُ رَبِّى حَقًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala hatha rahmatun min rabbee faitha jaa waAAdu rabbee jaAAalahu dakkaa wakana waAAdu rabbee haqqan

translations.en_sahih: [Dhul-Qarnayn] said, "This is a mercy from my Lord; but when the promise of my Lord comes, He will make it level, and ever is the promise of my Lord true."
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "This is a mercy from my Lord: But when the promise of my Lord comes to pass, He will make it into dust; and the promise of my Lord is true."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah itu) berkatalah Zulkarnain: "Ini ialah suatu rahmat dari Tuhanku; dalam pada itu, apabila sampai janji Tuhanku, Dia akan menjadikan tembok itu hancur lebur, dan adalah janji Tuhanku itu benar".

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَتَرَكْنَا بَعْضَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَمُوجُ فِى بَعْضٍ ۖ وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَجَمَعْنَـٰهُمْ جَمْعًا
ayahs.transliteration: Watarakna baAAdahum yawmaithin yamooju fee baAAdin wanufikha fee alssoori fajamaAAnahum jamAAan

translations.en_sahih: And We will leave them that day surging over each other, and [then] the Horn will be blown, and We will assemble them in [one] assembly.
translations.en_yusufali: On that day We shall leave them to surge like waves on one another: the trumpet will be blown, and We shall collect them all together.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami biarkan mereka pada hari itu (keluar beramai-ramai) bercampur-baur antara satu dengan yang lain; dan (kemudiannya) akan ditiup sangkakala, lalu Kami himpunkan makhluk-makhluk seluruhnya di Padang Mahsyar.

ayahs.arabic: وَعَرَضْنَا جَهَنَّمَ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْكَـٰفِرِينَ عَرْضًا
ayahs.transliteration: WaAAaradna jahannama yawmaithin lilkafireena AAardan

translations.en_sahih: And We will present Hell that Day to the Disbelievers, on display -
translations.en_yusufali: And We shall present Hell that day for Unbelievers to see, all spread out,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami perlihatkan neraka Jahannam, pada hari itu kepada orang-orang kafir, dengan pendedahan yang jelas nyata;

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ كَانَتْ أَعْيُنُهُمْ فِى غِطَآءٍ عَن ذِكْرِى وَكَانُوا۟ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ سَمْعًا
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena kanat aAAyunuhum fee ghitain AAan thikree wakanoo la yastateeAAoona samAAan

translations.en_sahih: Those whose eyes had been within a cover [removed] from My remembrance, and they were not able to hear.
translations.en_yusufali: (Unbelievers) whose eyes had been under a veil from remembrance of Me, and who had been unable even to hear.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) orang-orang yang matanya telah tertutup daripada melihat tanda-tanda yang membawa kepada mengingatiKu, dan mereka pula tidak dapat mendengar sama sekali.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَحَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَن يَتَّخِذُوا۟ عِبَادِى مِن دُونِىٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ ۚ إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا جَهَنَّمَ لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ نُزُلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Afahasiba allatheena kafaroo an yattakhithoo AAibadee min doonee awliyaa inna aAAtadna jahannama lilkafireena nuzulan

translations.en_sahih: Then do those who disbelieve think that they can take My servants instead of Me as allies? Indeed, We have prepared Hell for the disbelievers as a lodging.
translations.en_yusufali: Do the Unbelievers think that they can take My servants as protectors besides Me? Verily We have prepared Hell for the Unbelievers for (their) entertainment.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka adakah orang-orang kafir menyangka bahawa mereka mengambil hamba-hambaKu sebagai makhluk-makhluk yang disembah, selain daripadaKu, dapat menolong mereka? Sesungguhnya Kami telah sediakan neraka Jahannam bagi orang-orang kafir itu sebagai tempat tetamu.

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُم بِٱلْأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَـٰلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul hal nunabbiokum bialakhsareena aAAmalan

translations.en_sahih: Say, [O Muhammad], "Shall we [believers] inform you of the greatest losers as to [their] deeds?
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Shall we tell you of those who lose most in respect of their deeds?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Mahukah Kami khabarkan kepada kamu akan orang-orang yang paling rugi amal-amal perbuatannya?

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ضَلَّ سَعْيُهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَهُمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ يُحْسِنُونَ صُنْعًا
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena dalla saAAyuhum fee alhayati alddunya wahum yahsaboona annahum yuhsinoona sunAAan

translations.en_sahih: [They are] those whose effort is lost in worldly life, while they think that they are doing well in work."
translations.en_yusufali: "Those whose efforts have been wasted in this life, while they thought that they were acquiring good by their works?"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) orang-orang yang telah sia-sia amal usahanya dalam kehidupan dunia ini, sedang mereka menyangka bahawa mereka sentiasa betul dan baik pada apa sahaja yang mereka lakukan".

ayahs.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَلِقَآئِهِۦ فَحَبِطَتْ أَعْمَـٰلُهُمْ فَلَا نُقِيمُ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ وَزْنًا
ayahs.transliteration: Olaika allatheena kafaroo biayati rabbihim waliqaihi fahabitat aAAmaluhum fala nuqeemu lahum yawma alqiyamati waznan

translations.en_sahih: Those are the ones who disbelieve in the verses of their Lord and in [their] meeting Him, so their deeds have become worthless; and We will not assign to them on the Day of Resurrection any importance.
translations.en_yusufali: They are those who deny the Signs of their Lord and the fact of their having to meet Him (in the Hereafter): vain will be their works, nor shall We, on the Day of Judgment, give them any weight.
translations.ms_basmeih: Merekalah orang-orang yang kufur ingkar akan ayat-ayat Tuhan mereka dan akan pertemuan denganNya; oleh itu gugurlah amal-amal mereka; maka akibatya Kami tidak akan memberi sebarang timbangan untuk menilai amal mereka, pada hari kiamat kelak.

ayahs.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَآؤُهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ بِمَا كَفَرُوا۟ وَٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ ءَايَـٰتِى وَرُسُلِى هُزُوًا
ayahs.transliteration: Thalika jazaohum jahannamu bima kafaroo waittakhathoo ayatee warusulee huzuwan

translations.en_sahih: That is their recompense - Hell - for what they denied and [because] they took My signs and My messengers in ridicule.
translations.en_yusufali: That is their reward, Hell, because they rejected Faith, and took My Signs and My Messengers by way of jest.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka yang bersifat) demikian, balasannya neraka Jahannam, disebabkan mereka kufur ingkar, dan mereka pula menjadikan ayat-ayatKu dan Rasul-rasulKu sebagai ejek-ejekan.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتُ ٱلْفِرْدَوْسِ نُزُلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati kanat lahum jannatu alfirdawsi nuzulan

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - they will have the Gardens of Paradise as a lodging,
translations.en_yusufali: As to those who believe and work righteous deeds, they have, for their entertainment, the Gardens of Paradise,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal soleh, disediakan bagi mereka Syurga-syurga Firdaus, sebagai tempat tetamu (yang serba mewah).

ayahs.arabic: خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا لَا يَبْغُونَ عَنْهَا حِوَلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Khalideena feeha la yabghoona AAanha hiwalan

translations.en_sahih: Wherein they abide eternally. They will not desire from it any transfer.
translations.en_yusufali: Wherein they shall dwell (for aye): no change will they wish for from them.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka kekal di dalamnya, (dan) tidak ingin berpindah daripadanya.

ayahs.arabic: قُل لَّوْ كَانَ ٱلْبَحْرُ مِدَادًا لِّكَلِمَـٰتِ رَبِّى لَنَفِدَ ٱلْبَحْرُ قَبْلَ أَن تَنفَدَ كَلِمَـٰتُ رَبِّى وَلَوْ جِئْنَا بِمِثْلِهِۦ مَدَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul law kana albahru midadan likalimati rabbee lanafida albahru qabla an tanfada kalimatu rabbee walaw jina bimithlihi madadan

translations.en_sahih: Say, "If the sea were ink for [writing] the words of my Lord, the sea would be exhausted before the words of my Lord were exhausted, even if We brought the like of it as a supplement."
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "If the ocean were ink (wherewith to write out) the words of my Lord, sooner would the ocean be exhausted than would the words of my Lord, even if we added another ocean like it, for its aid."
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Kalaulah semua jenis lautan menjadi tinta untuk menulis Kalimah-kalimah Tuhanku, sudah tentu akan habis kering lautan itu sebelum habis Kalimah-kalimah Tuhanku, walaupun Kami tambahi lagi dengan lautan yang sebanding dengannya, sebagai bantuan".

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلَـٰهُكُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ وَٰحِدٌ ۖ فَمَن كَانَ يَرْجُوا۟ لِقَآءَ رَبِّهِۦ فَلْيَعْمَلْ عَمَلًا صَـٰلِحًا وَلَا يُشْرِكْ بِعِبَادَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ أَحَدًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul innama ana basharun mithlukum yooha ilayya annama ilahukum ilahun wahidun faman kana yarjoo liqaa rabbihi falyaAAmal AAamalan salihan wala yushrik biAAibadati rabbihi ahadan

translations.en_sahih: Say, "I am only a man like you, to whom has been revealed that your god is one God. So whoever would hope for the meeting with his Lord - let him do righteous work and not associate in the worship of his Lord anyone."
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "I am but a man like yourselves, (but) the inspiration has come to me, that your Allah is one Allah: whoever expects to meet his Lord, let him work righteousness, and, in the worship of his Lord, admit no one as partner.
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Sesungguhnya aku hanyalah seorang manusia seperti kamu, diwahyukan kepadaku bahawa Tuhan kamu hanyalah Tuhan Yang Satu; Oleh itu, sesiapa yang percaya dan berharap akan pertemuan dengan Tuhannya, hendaklah ia mengerjakan amal yang soleh dan janganlah ia mempersekutukan sesiapapun dalam ibadatnya kepada Tuhannya".
